headlines.title: Iceberg lettuce supplier investigated as possible source in cyclosporiasis outbreak
headlines.description: The FDA is investigating iceberg lettuce supplied to Taco Bell by Taylor Farms as a source in an escalating outbreak of cyclosporiasis.

headlines.title: Taylor Farms Lettuce at Taco Bell Linked to Stomach Bug Outbreak
headlines.description: The Food and Drug Administration is investigating a potential connection to iceberg lettuce supplied to Taco Bell by produce giant Taylor Farms as the possible source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak that has sickened thousands across 34 states. The fast-food giant is announcing a voluntary recall of some potentially impacted lettuce from its restaurants. NBC’s Anne Thompson reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Iceberg lettuce eyed in parasite outbreak
headlines.description: The FDA is investigating iceberg lettuce supplied to Taco Bell by Taylor Farms as a potential source for the cyclosporiasis outbreak in five midwestern states. It's a parasite-borne illness triggering severe cramps and diarrhea. NBC News' Anne Thompson reports.

headlines.title: Midwest sees world's worst air quality as wildfire smoke spreads
headlines.description: Smoke from Canadian wildfires is blanketing major cities across the U.S., obscuring iconic skylines and prompting air quality alerts. NBC News’ Maggie Vespa reports.

headlines.title: Iceberg lettuce supplier being investigated by FDA as source of cyclosporiasis outbreak
headlines.description: The Food and Drug Administration is investigating an iceberg lettuce supplier as the source of a parasite outbreak causing "explosive" diarrhea in people who contract the illness. Nationwide, nearly 7,000 people may have been sickened, with 1,645 of those cases confirmed and more than 5,100 still under investigation.

headlines.title: 53+ best new products in July from Hoka, Beis, Olaplex and more
headlines.description: We rounded up July’s newest tech, home and beauty products. Shop the Hoka Clifton 11, Beis Weekender, Olaplex serum oil mist and more.

headlines.title: Talking Shop with Béis founder Shay Mitchell
headlines.description: Béis used customer feedback to redesign its core collection of travel essentials, including The Weekender. Founder Shay Mitchell shares what’s new and what she packs inside.

headlines.title: Deal of the Day: Medicube’s new skin care device is already over 25% off on Amazon
headlines.description: Medicube’s Booster Pro X2 is 26% off. The new device is an upgrade to the Booster Pro and has seven modes that work for all skin types.

headlines.title: These shampoos are 100% pregnancy-safe, according to experts
headlines.description: The best pregnancy-safe shampoos won’t exacerbate scalp dryness or dandruff. Shop the best ones from Necessaire, Vanicream and more.

headlines.title: FDA approves new kind of cholesterol pill
headlines.description: Merck said on Thursday the Food and Drug Administration has approved Lipfendra, a PCSK9 inhibitor cholesterol pill.

headlines.title: U.S. military will test service members’ testosterone levels, Pete Hegseth says
headlines.description: Hegseth said service members ages 30 and older will undergo screenings to ensure they “have the biological foundation required to sustain the fight.”

headlines.title: Nearly 7,000 cases of cyclosporiasis confirmed or under investigation nationwide, CDC says
headlines.description: Michigan health officials suggested lettuce or salad greens could be possible sources. Taco Bell said it had removed some ingredients “as a precautionary measure.”
